text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a bone-chillingly cold night during the holiday
season. I'm working in my office when...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ho, ho, ho! Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Still hard at work on this festive night? Fear
not—Santa has arrived just for you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Well? Aren't you thrilled?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was I supposed to bring something?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ho, ho, ho! Well, this year Santa's on a budget!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Just my presence alone should be heartwarming
enough!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Now I must take my leave! Farewell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little while later...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ho, ho, ho! Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ho, ho, ho! Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, you looked kinda lonely so I brought
Mayano along!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If I spend the holidays with an adult, I'm sure I'll
start feeling mature too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we had our last holiday party at the dorm
with the others...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So this year let's throw a grown-up holiday party! Which means we need to get a giant turkey!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! I've seen those in the movies! Yay! Being
grown-up is so cool!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer, you prep the turkey while we get
the party jumping!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why I'm the one entertaining Santa,
but it's a wonderful and warm event regardless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little while later...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ho, ho, ho! Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ho, ho, ho! Santa has many incarnations,
don'tcha know!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Um, so I made sure to bring gifts this time! Just
wait here while I get them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio begins to line up a series of mysterious
white boxes on the table.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! Here are all the presents from Teio Santa!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I made a bunch of dishes! There's something
different in each box!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But just serving it up normally would be boring,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You have to eat each one in the order you open
it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The truth is... I didn't have a clue what kind of
present to get you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But when I saw you working in the cold, I knew
exactly what you needed!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm not much of a cook, but today's a special day!
Hurry up and dig in while it's still warm!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Bon appetit!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Ahahaha! You opened the cake first! Looks like
you're starting with dessert!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both my heart and body are warmed by Teio's
surprise. I have a wonderful night.
